title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 2: He's handsome.
desc:
- review 
 - Adj to describe overall appearance (cont): handsome, pretty, cute, sporty
Review: 
- What do you look like? - I'm tall.
New structure: 
- What does he/she look like? - He's handsome.

title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 3: Is she shy?
desc:
- Review words in L2
Review:

New structure: 
- Is he/she shy? Yes, he is/she is. // No, he isn't/she isn't.

title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 4: Why do you like him?
desc:
- Review L3 vocab
- Is he/she shy? Yes, he is/she is. // No, he isn't/she isn't.

- Why do you like him/her? - Because she's kind and clever.
